description: Know2Protect statistic card in landscape format. The background is an orange-to-magenta gradient overlaid with a faint spiderweb texture. On the left is a large rounded-square white speech-bubble panel containing a face emoji covering its eyes with both hands and smiling, with the bubble's tail pointing right toward the text. The right side carries the statistic in white sans-serif type with phrases highlighted in white-on-blue boxes: 'Nearly half of parents of teens (46%) say they are EXTREMELY OR VERY WORRIED that their teen's use of social media could lead to them BEING EXPOSED TO EXPLICIT CONTENT.' Bottom-left in white reads 'Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation' and 'To learn more, go to know2protect.gov'; bottom-right shows the circular Know2Protect logo with a chat-bubble icon.
notable_text: Nearly half of parents of teens (46%) say they are EXTREMELY OR VERY WORRIED that their teen's use of social media could lead to them BEING EXPOSED TO EXPLICIT CONTENT.; Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation; know2protect.gov
